title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino, Honorable Vice Mayor Josephine S. Evangelista and Acting Municipal Treasurer Maria Luisa G. Diaz to Be the Authorized Signatories on the Disbursements and Do Other Banking Transactions in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños with Land Bank of the Philippines-los Baños Branch. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, REE, RMP, MPA, 07/4/2022)
